blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 20 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,053 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
